title: Yub Nub (disambiguation)
content:
"'''Yub Nub'''" was an [[Ewokese]] word for "freedom."<ref name="Traveler's Guide">''[[Star Wars: Galaxy's Edge: Traveler's Guide to Batuu]]''</ref> It may also refer to the following items:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Yub Nub]]''', an [[alcohol]]ic beverage served at [[Oga's Cantina]] on [[Batuu]].

==[[In-universe|Out-of-universe]]==
*"[[Ewok Celebration]]," also known as "'''Yub Nub'''," a song originally used in [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']].
*'''[[Yub Nub!]]''', the sixth episode of ''[[LEGO Star Wars: All-Stars]]''

==Notes and references==
